queries.question: For each editor, what is the name and version of the corresponding program?
queries.sql: select editors.full_name , software_programs.name , software_programs.version from EditorSoftwarePrograms join Software_Programs on EditorSoftwarePrograms.software_program_id = Software_Programs.program_id join Editors on EditorSoftwarePrograms.editor_id = Editors.editor_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?full_name ?name ?version WHERE {
  ?editorsoftwareprograms a :EditorSoftwarePrograms .
  ?software_programs a :Software_Programs .
  ?editorsoftwareprograms p:hasSoftware_Programs ?software_programs .
  ?editors a :Editors .
  ?editorsoftwareprograms p:hasEditors ?editors .
  ?editors p:name ?full_name .
  ?software_programs p:name ?name .
  ?software_programs p:version ?version .
}

queries.question: Show me the name of software programs that we have for every editor
queries.sql: SELECT Software_Programs.name  from EditorSoftwarePrograms join Software_Programs on EditorSoftwarePrograms.software_program_id = Software_Programs.program_id join Editors on EditorSoftwarePrograms.editor_id = Editors.editor_id   GROUP BY EditorSoftwarePrograms.software_program_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EditorSoftwarePrograms.editor_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Editors)

queries.question: Show me the name of software programs that we have for every editor
queries.sql: select editors.full_name , software_programs.name from EditorSoftwarePrograms join Software_Programs on EditorSoftwarePrograms.software_program_id = Software_Programs.program_id join Editors on EditorSoftwarePrograms.editor_id = Editors.editor_id
queries.sparql:

queries.question: What is the version of the program that is most popular among all editors?
queries.sql: SELECT Software_Programs.version  from EditorSoftwarePrograms join Software_Programs on EditorSoftwarePrograms.software_program_id = Software_Programs.program_id join Editors on EditorSoftwarePrograms.editor_id = Editors.editor_id   GROUP BY EditorSoftwarePrograms.software_program_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EditorSoftwarePrograms.editor_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Editors)

queries.question: Give me the name and version of programs for each editor.
queries.sql: SELECT Software_Programs.name, Software_Programs.version  from EditorSoftwarePrograms join Software_Programs on EditorSoftwarePrograms.software_program_id = Software_Programs.program_id join Editors on EditorSoftwarePrograms.editor_id = Editors.editor_id   GROUP BY EditorSoftwarePrograms.software_program_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EditorSoftwarePrograms.editor_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Editors)

queries.question: For every editor, list the version of programs that are used.
queries.sql: select editors.full_name , software_programs.version from EditorSoftwarePrograms join Software_Programs on EditorSoftwarePrograms.software_program_id = Software_Programs.program_id join Editors on EditorSoftwarePrograms.editor_id = Editors.editor_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?full_name ?version WHERE {
  ?editorsoftwareprograms a :EditorSoftwarePrograms .
  ?software_programs a :Software_Programs .
  ?editorsoftwareprograms p:hasSoftware_Programs ?software_programs .
  ?editors a :Editors .
  ?editorsoftwareprograms p:hasEditors ?editors .
  ?editors p:name ?full_name .
  ?software_programs p:version ?version .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the name and version of programs for each editor.
Show me the name of software programs that we have for every editor
Show me the version of programs each editor uses.
